---
title: "subset_data_for_positively_expressed_cells"
author: "Beth Moore"
date: "2024-10-08"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(Seurat)
library(patchwork)
library(purrr)
library(jsonlite)
library(rmarkdown)
library(reticulate)
library(SeuratWrappers)
library(ggplot2)
library(SeuratDisk)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
use_condaenv("scRNAseq_new")

# set variables
GIT_DIR <- "/w5home/bmoore/scRNAseq_downstream/"
config <- jsonlite::fromJSON(file.path(GIT_DIR, "config.json"))
# DATA_DIR <- config$subset_seurat$DATA_DIR
# SEURAT_OBJ <- config$subset_seurat$SEURAT_OBJ
# GENE_LIST <- config$subset_seurat$GENE_LIST
# DIM.RED <- config$subset_seurat$DIM.RED
# ANNOT <- config$subset_seurat$ANNOT

DATA_DIR <- "/w5home/bmoore/Pierre_sc_zebrafish/output_subset-recluster_20260204_094842/"
SEURAT_OBJ <- "seuratobj_all_reclustered.rds"
GENE_LIST <- config$subset_seurat$GENE_LIST
DIM.RED <- "pca"
ANNOT <- "seurat_clusters_res0.75"

# set up environment and output
setwd(DATA_DIR)
timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")
output <- paste0("output_subset_", timestamp)
dir.create(output, showWarnings = FALSE)
file.copy(paste0(GIT_DIR, "config.json"), file.path(output, "config.json"))
output <- paste0(output, "/")
config <- jsonlite::fromJSON(file.path(output, "config.json"))
source(paste0(GIT_DIR, "src/sc_pipeline_functions.R"))
```
```{r load_data}
seurat.obj <- readRDS(file = SEURAT_OBJ)
seurat.obj
colnames(seurat.obj@meta.data)
```
# create Timepoint and Condition metadata from Type
```{r split_metadata}
# Extract timepoint: everything before the hyphen (or the full value for Sham/1Wk)
seurat.obj$Timepoint <- gsub("-.*", "", seurat.obj$Type)

# Extract condition: everything after the hyphen, or "Undetermined" for Sham/1Wk
seurat.obj$Condition <- ifelse(
        grepl("-", seurat.obj$Type),
        gsub(".*-", "", seurat.obj$Type),
        "Undetermined"
)

# Verify the new columns
table(seurat.obj$Timepoint)
table(seurat.obj$Condition)
table(seurat.obj$Type, seurat.obj$Timepoint)
table(seurat.obj$Type, seurat.obj$Condition)
```
# subset for positively expressed genelist
```{r get_cells}
new.obj <- GetAssayData(object = seurat.obj, layer = "data")[GENE_LIST, ] > 0
```
```{r subset}
# get the required cells
df <- as.data.frame(new.obj)
# get cells that are true
cellstokeep <- which(apply(df, 2, any))
# subset the required cells
seurat.obj_subset <- subset(seurat.obj, cells = cellstokeep)
seurat.obj_subset
```
# subset according to metadata
```{r subset2}
seurat.obj_subset <- subset(seurat.obj, subset = seurat_clusters_res0.75 == "3")
seurat.obj_subset
```

```{r plot}
plot_function <- function(seurat.obj_subset, DIM.RED, output, cluster_name, ANNOT) {
        p1 <- DimPlot(seurat.obj_subset,
                reduction = DIM.RED, label = TRUE,
                pt.size = 0.5, group.by = ANNOT
        )
        p2 <- DimPlot(seurat.obj,
                reduction = DIM.RED, label = TRUE,
                pt.size = 0.5, group.by = ANNOT
        )
        p3 <- DimPlot(seurat.obj_subset,
                reduction = DIM.RED,
                pt.size = 0.5, group.by = "Condition"
        )
        p4 <- DimPlot(seurat.obj_subset,
                reduction = DIM.RED, label = TRUE,
                pt.size = 0.5, group.by = "Timepoint"
        )

        # Combined plot: Timepoint as color, Condition as shape
        embed <- Embeddings(seurat.obj_subset, reduction = DIM.RED)[, 1:2]
        plot_df <- data.frame(
                PC_1 = embed[, 1],
                PC_2 = embed[, 2],
                Timepoint = seurat.obj_subset$Timepoint,
                Condition = seurat.obj_subset$Condition
        )
        p5 <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = PC_1, y = PC_2, color = Timepoint, shape = Condition)) +
                geom_point(size = 1.5, alpha = 0.7) +
                theme_classic() +
                labs(
                        title = "PCA: Timepoint (color) & Condition (shape)",
                        x = "PC 1", y = "PC 2"
                ) +
                guides(
                        color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3)),
                        shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))
                )

        combined_plot <- ((p1 | p2) / (p3 | p4) / p5) + plot_layout(
                width = c(2, 2, 2),
                heights = c(1, 1, 1)
        )
        pdf(file = paste0(output, "seurat_subset_cluster_", cluster_name, ".pdf"), width = 12, height = 12)
        print(combined_plot)
        dev.off()
}
```
# loop through clusters, subset and plot
```{r loop}
cluster_list <- unique(seurat.obj@meta.data$seurat_clusters_res0.75)
for (cluster_name in cluster_list) {
        print(cluster_name)
        seurat.obj_subset <- subset(seurat.obj, subset = seurat_clusters_res0.75 == cluster_name)
        # redo pca
        seurat.obj_subset <- RunPCA(object = seurat.obj_subset)
        plot_function(seurat.obj_subset, DIM.RED, output, cluster_name, ANNOT)
}
```

```{r manual cluster list}
cluster_list <- list(
        glial = c("3", "5", "7", "26", "25"), schwann = c("2", "6", "15", "16"),
        fibroblast = c("13"), neurons = c("4", "8", "10", "11", "12", "18", "28", "19"),
        immune = c("1", "9", "17", "21", "22")
)

for (i in 1:length(cluster_list)) {
        cluster_name <- names(cluster_list[i])
        print(cluster_name)
        clusterL <- cluster_list[[i]]
        seurat.obj_subset <- subset(seurat.obj, subset = seurat_clusters_res0.75 %in% clusterL)
        table(seurat.obj_subset$seurat_clusters_res0.75)
        # redo pca
        seurat.obj_subset <- RunPCA(object = seurat.obj_subset)
        plot_function(seurat.obj_subset, DIM.RED, output, cluster_name, ANNOT)
}
```

```{r logFC}
logFC_function <- function(seurat.obj, cluster_name, output) {
        # get total number of cells for each condition
        cond_table <- table(seurat.obj$Condition)
        cond_table <- as.data.frame(rbind(cond_table))
        NR_tot <- cond_table$NR
        R_tot <- cond_table$R

        seurat.obj_subset <- subset(seurat.obj, subset = seurat_clusters_res0.75 == cluster_name & Timepoint == c("2Wk", "4Wk", "6Wk"))
        mytable <- table(seurat.obj_subset$Condition, seurat.obj_subset$Timepoint)
        df <- as.data.frame(rbind(mytable))
        # proportions
        df["prop_NR", ] <- df["NR", ] / NR_tot
        df["prop_R", ] <- df["R", ] / R_tot
        # get log FC
        df["log2FC", ] <- log2((as.numeric(df["R", ]) / R_tot) / (as.numeric(df["NR", ]) / NR_tot))
        # write out data
        write.csv(df, file = paste0(output, "cluster", cluster_name, "_log2FC_data.csv"), row.names = TRUE)
        # get only logFC row and pivot longer
        dflfc <- df["log2FC", ]
        dflfc
        timepoints <- colnames(dflfc)
        long_df <- tidyr::pivot_longer(dflfc, cols = timepoints, names_to = "Timepoint", values_to = "log2FC")
        long_df
        # get direction where + is R and - is NR
        long_df$direction <- ifelse(long_df$log2FC > 0, "R", "NR")
        # plot log fold change
        p1 <- ggplot(long_df, aes(x = factor(Timepoint, levels = Timepoint), y = log2FC, fill = direction)) +
                geom_col() +
                scale_fill_manual(values = c("R" = "blue", "NR" = "red")) +
                ggtitle(paste0("cluster ", cluster_name, " R vs NR")) +
                theme_bw() +
                ylab("log2 Fold Change of Cell Counts") +
                xlab("Time")
        p1
        pdf(file = paste0(output, "cluster", cluster_name, "_log2FC_plot.pdf"), width = 4, height = 4)
        print(p1)
        dev.off()
}
```

```{r}
cluster_list <- unique(seurat.obj@meta.data$seurat_clusters_res0.75)
cluster_list <- cluster_list[cluster_list != "29"]
for (cluster_name in cluster_list) {
        print(cluster_name)
        logFC_function(seurat.obj, cluster_name, output)
}
```

```{r save}
saveRDS(seurat.obj_subset, file = paste0(output, "seurat.obj_subset.rds"))
```
# save session info
```{r sessioninfo}
writeLines(capture.output(sessionInfo()), paste0(output, "sessionInfo.txt"))
```
